title: 404 7 URL Audit — Phase 20.6
source: GSC Pages report: Not found (404) (7 URLs, +2 from 5 on Jun 7)
status: PARTIALLY_EXTRACTED — 2 new 404s identified, full list requires GSC drilldown

classification_summary.emergency_risk_level: MEDIUM — 2 new 404s appeared. Must verify these are NOT important pages.

known_404_patterns.source: Broken internal links from template changes or page moves
Google discovering old/deprecated URLs from sitemap history
Typo/incorrect URLs in blog content or internal links
Pages deleted during V2 cleanup that still have residual references

emergency_rule.rule: If any important calculator, guide, decision, or blog is returning 404, FIX IMMEDIATELY.

fix_strategy.intentional_404s: Return 410 (Gone) to signal permanent removal to Google. Do NOT 301 redirect to unrelated pages.
fix_strategy.accidental_404s: Restore the page OR 301 redirect to the most relevant existing page.
fix_strategy.verification: curl each 404 URL to confirm HTTP status before taking action

recommended_action: Extract exact 404 URLs via GSC Pages drilldown → verify each with curl → classify as intentional/accidental → fix or 410 accordingly.
important_pages_safety_check: PENDING — verify no important pages in 404 list
